data.job_description:
Dice is the leading career destination for tech experts at every stage of their careers. Our client, Pull Skill Technologies, is seeking the following. Apply via Dice today!

Role: Kong Developer

Location: Hybrid Chicago, IL

Need Kong Experience.

Job Summary
• We are seeking exceptional engineering talent to help elevate and modernize our software engineering practices across the enterprise.
• This role goes beyond traditional development - it is an opportunity to shape how we design build secure test deploy and operate software at scale.
• You will play a key role in advancing reusable architecture reliability engineering cloud-native design DevSecOps maturity and next-generation testing practices.
• We are looking for engineers who bring deep expertise in API schema design enterprise SRE practices modern cloud platforms AWS infrastructure as code IaC CI/CD automation observability Dynatrace and service connectivity platforms such as Kong Gateway and Kong Mesh.
• This role will help embed quality automation and GenAI-assisted development into our day-to-day engineering workflows - enabling high-performing autonomous 2-pizza teams to deliver resilient scalable and secure software products.

What Youll Do
• Architect design and implement scalable reusable and highly reliable software systems for enterprise-scale platforms
• Lead API-first design practices including schema governance and service contract standards
• Advance modern Site Reliability Engineering SRE practices improving availability resilience observability and operational excellence
• Design and implement cloud-native solutions on AWS using Infrastructure as Code and automated CI/CD pipelines
• Drive DevSecOps practices by integrating security compliance and automated testing into the development lifecycle
• Elevate testing maturity through advanced automation performance engineering chaos testing and quality engineering principles
• Integrate GenAI tooling into engineering workflows to improve productivity code quality and documentation standards
• Leverage platforms such as Kong Gateway Kong Mesh and Dynatrace to strengthen API management service connectivity and observability
• Serve as a technical leader and subject matter expert across development initiatives
• Participate in full lifecycle engineering - from requirements and architecture through deployment and production support
• Mentor engineers and influence engineering standards governance and best practices
• Collaborate within high-performing 2-pizza teams enabling autonomy ownership and rapid delivery

Key Responsibilities:
• Design develop document test and debug enterprise-grade software systems
• Define and enforce modern engineering standards for reusability reliability and maintainability
• Conduct architecture reviews and provide strategic input on technology direction
• Analyze and refactor legacy systems to improve scalability performance and operational stability
• Develop and implement automated quality assurance processes and engineering metrics
• Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend strategic adoption where appropriate
• Work closely with product design QA security and platform teams to deliver high-quality outcomes
• Contribute to governance models that balance speed safety and compliance
• Support and continuously improve production systems through data-driven reliability practices

Who You Are
• Deep expertise in API design cloud-native architecture and enterprise integration patterns
• Strong experience with AWS IaC CI/CD pipelines and DevSecOps toolchains
• Hands-on knowledge of SRE principles including SLIs/SLOs error budgets observability and incident management
• Experience with Kong Gateway Kong Mesh Dynatrace or comparable enterprise platforms
• Advocate for advanced automated testing and quality engineering
• Passionate about integrating GenAI into development workflows responsibly and effectively
• Comfortable operating in autonomous cross-functional 2-pizza teams
• Strong technical communicator capable of influencing engineering practices at scale

Qualifications: We are looking for engineers who bring deep expertise in API schema design enterprise SRE practices modern cloud platforms AWS infrastructure as code IaC CI/CD automation observability Dynatrace and service connectivity platforms such as Kong Gateway and Kong Mesh

data.job_description:
Job Title: Java Back-end developer

Location: Chicago, IL.

Duration: 12+ Months

This role requires 5 days onsite.

Job Description :

• Liaise with fellow developers

• Designing and implementing microservices which use the spring boot framework.

• Working in compliance with the full Software Development Life Cycle.

• Connecting microservices to interact with databases.

• Understanding of how streaming technologies work such as Kafka.

• Build Azure/AWS pipelines

• Identifying and finding solutions to bugs.

• Ensure you've written adequate test cases to verify design requirements are being met.

• Create well written documentation for the individual microservices.

Knowledge/Skills

• JAVA SDK8 or newer

• Microservices based on Springboot

• Development experience with React

• Azure or AWS Services their integration & Development

• Oracle or similar Database

• Agile Methodology

• Knowledge of full software development lifecycle

• Strong analytical and problem solving skills

• A positive goal orientated attitude with a focus on delivery

Preferred/ Recommended:

• Familiarity with financial market/instrument/Trade lifecycle

• Ability to write SQL.

Experience

• Bachelor degree in Computer Science or a related discipline

• Overall 10+ Years of Industry experience in IT.

• Experience in agile development methodology.

• Proven ability to collaborate with high-performing teams and individuals throughout the firm to accomplish common goals.

data.job_description:
Achieving our goals starts with supporting yours. Grow your career, access top-tier health and wellness benefits, build lasting connections with your team and our customers, and travel the world using our extensive route network.

Come join us to create what’s next. Let’s define tomorrow, together.

Description

United's Digital Technology team is comprised of many talented individuals all working together with cutting-edge technology to build the best airline in the history of aviation. Our team designs, develops and maintains massively scaling technology solutions brought to life with innovative architectures, data analytics, and digital solutions.

Job overview and responsibilities

The Senior Software Developer will be responsible for the development of critical applications, while working with a team of developers. This role will design, develop, document, test and debug new and existing applications. Additionally, this role will build these applications with a focus on delivering cloud-based solutions. The individual will use groundbreaking technologies and enterprise grade integration software daily and will be relied upon to help take the team to the next level from a technological standpoint.
• Manages and participates in the full development life cycle, including requirements analysis and design, using Agile methodologies
• Serve as a technical expert on development projects.
• Creates the application framework, reusable components, and coding guidelines.
• Good knowledge of deployment practices, pipelines, and related technologies.
• Write technical specifications based on the conceptual design and stated business requirements
• Support, maintain, and document software functionality
• Identify and evaluate new technologies for implementation
• Analyze code to find causes of errors and revise programs as needed
• Manages and participates in software design meetings and analyzes user needs to determine technical requirements
• Collaborate & lead tech teams consisting of employees & vendor company contractors in planning and execution, serving as a technology leader
• Collaborate with end user to prototype, refine, test, and debug programs to meet needs

Qualifications

What’s needed to succeed (Minimum Qualifications):
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Management Information Systems, or related field
• 3+ years of experience in design, development, documenting, testing, and debugging of new and existing software systems and/or applications for market sale or large-scale proprietary software for internal use in an agile environment
• Experience implementing AWS technologies (Lambda, Step Functions, CloudWatch, CloudFront, Cognito, Route53, DynamoDB, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, API Gateway)
• Experience with Cloud Automation Development Tool such as Git, Python/Bash/PowerShell Scripting
• Hands-on development and proficient excellence in backend API development using Node.js, Java, and Python (nice to have)
• Strong knowledge of Spring framework, SQL, NoSQL, and Design Patterns, messaging platforms like IBM MQ, Solace, Kafka, JMS, etc., APM observability tools
• Excellent understanding of Object-Oriented systems design and Application Development
• Must be legally authorized to work in the United States for any employer without sponsorship
• Successful completion of the interview is required to meet the job qualification
• Reliable, punctual attendance is an essential function of the position

What will help you propel from the pack (Preferred Qualifications):
• Airlines industry experience is a plus

The base pay range for this role is $112,480.00 to $146,540.00.
The base salary range/hourly rate listed is dependent on job-related, factors such as experience, education, and skills. This position is also eligible for bonus and/or long-term incentive compensation awards.

You may be eligible for the following competitive benefits: medical, dental, vision, life, accident & disability, parental leave, employee assistance program, commuter, paid holidays, paid time off, 401(k) and flight privileges.

United Airlines is an equal opportunity employer. United Airlines recruits, employs, trains, compensates and promotes regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender identity, sexual orientation, physical ability, age, veteran status and other protected status as required by applicable law. Equal Opportunity Employer - Minorities/Women/Veterans/Disabled/LGBT.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions. Please contact JobAccommodations@united.com to request accommodation.

Qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Management Information Systems, or related field

3+ years of experience in design, development, documenting, testing, and debugging of new and existing software systems and/or applications for market sale or large-scale proprietary software for internal use in an agile environment
Experience implementing AWS technologies (Lambda, Step Functions, CloudWatch, CloudFront, Cognito, Route53, DynamoDB, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, API Gateway)
Experience with Cloud Automation Development Tool such as Git, Python/Bash/PowerShell Scripting
Hands-on development and proficient excellence in backend API development using Node.js, Java, and Python (nice to have)
Strong knowledge of Spring framework, SQL, NoSQL, and Design Patterns, messaging platforms like IBM MQ, Solace, Kafka, JMS, etc., APM observability tools
Excellent understanding of Object-Oriented systems design and Application Development
Must be legally authorized to work in the United States for any employer without sponsorship
Successful completion of the interview is required to meet the job qualification
Reliable, punctual attendance is an essential function of the position
Benefits: The base pay range for this role is $112,480.00 to $146,540.00
The base salary range/hourly rate listed is dependent on job-related, factors such as experience, education, and skills
This position is also eligible for bonus and/or long-term incentive compensation awards

You may be eligible for the following competitive benefits: medical, dental, vision, life, accident & disability, parental leave, employee assistance program, commuter, paid holidays, paid time off, 401(k) and flight privileges

This role will design, develop, document, test and debug new and existing applications
Additionally, this role will build these applications with a focus on delivering cloud-based solutions
The individual will use groundbreaking technologies and enterprise grade integration software daily and will be relied upon to help take the team to the next level from a technological standpoint

data.job_description:
Lensa is a career site that helps job seekers find great jobs in the US. We are not a staffing firm or agency. Lensa does not hire directly for these jobs, but promotes jobs on LinkedIn on behalf of its direct clients, recruitment ad agencies, and marketing partners. Lensa partners with DirectEmployers to promote this job for Insight Global. Clicking "Apply Now" or "Read more" on Lensa redirects you to the job board/employer site. Any information collected there is subject to their terms and privacy notice.

Job Description

This large global hotel chain is revamping a CMS product that will feature landing pages. They are rewriting the back end, and this team has taken over the front end as they build it out. This product is more customer/user focused, as the data that goes into the tool goes out to be serviced to the hotel guest. The team needs a skilled full stack developer who has React on the front end with Node.Js, and AWS on the back end. There will be some API work as well, so front end user facing development is a must. This developer should have great communication, being collaborative, resourceful, and strategic in their development (not just a heads down developer). Ideally the team would like someone who has used diagram tools to present ideas well.

We are a company committed to creating diverse and inclusive environments where people can bring their full, authentic selves to work every day. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer that believes everyone matters. Qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment regardless of their race, color, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, marital status, national origin, ancestry, genetic factors, age, disability, protected veteran status, military or uniformed service member status, or any other status or characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or recruiting process, please send a request to HR@insightglobal.com.To learn more about how we collect, keep, and process your private information, please review Insight Global's Workforce Privacy Policy: https://insightglobal.com/workforce-privacy-policy/.

Skills And Requirements

Front End Framework: React, TypeScript - React is the framework, Typescript is the programming language (they should have both)

AWS Specific Services (Lambda, API Gateway, Document DB/MongoDB, DynamoDB)

Backend: NodeJs, TypeScript, Serverless Framework

API work, front end user facing work is necessary and would make this candidate stand out

Great communication, collaborative and strategic in their development (not just a heads down developer)

Someone who can use diagram tools to present ideas well (more than just a heads down developer but someone who can stick their neck out and be resourceful, proactive). IaaC: Terraform

Monitoring Tools: DataDog

AI skills such as Claude Code

Somone who has worked on a CMS product

If you have questions about this posting, please contact support@lensa.com

Qualifications: The team needs a skilled full stack developer who has React on the front end with Node.Js, and AWS on the back end
There will be some API work as well, so front end user facing development is a must
This developer should have great communication, being collaborative, resourceful, and strategic in their development (not just a heads down developer)
Ideally the team would like someone who has used diagram tools to present ideas well
Front End Framework: React, TypeScript - React is the framework, Typescript is the programming language (they should have both)
Backend: NodeJs, TypeScript, Serverless Framework
API work, front end user facing work is necessary and would make this candidate stand out
Great communication, collaborative and strategic in their development (not just a heads down developer)
Someone who can use diagram tools to present ideas well (more than just a heads down developer but someone who can stick their neck out and be resourceful, proactive)
IaaC: Terraform
AI skills such as Claude Code
Somone who has worked on a CMS product
Responsibilities: This product is more customer/user focused, as the data that goes into the tool goes out to be serviced to the hotel guest

Dice is the leading career destination for tech experts at every stage of their careers. Our client, Empower Professionals, is seeking the following. Apply via Dice today!

Role- .Net Developer

Location- Chicago, IL.-3 days onsite

Must Have Skills

Dot Net

Azure

typerscript

Key Responsibilities
• Design and implement Azure Functions based microservices and serverless architectures.
• Build RESTful APIs with authentication and security controls (JWT, Azure AD).
• Develop AI-powered data processing pipelines using Azure OpenAI services and GPT models.
• Implement:
• Blob Storage management
• Search indexing (Azure AI Search)
• Database operations using Entity Framework Core and SQL Server
• Create intelligent data extraction systems with JSON schema validation and configuration management.
• Build workflow engines with state management and business process automation.

Frontend Development
• Develop modern React applications using TypeScript and component-based architecture.
• Implement interactive features using Canvas API and advanced UI libraries.
• Build real-time notification systems and data visualization dashboards using Material-UI.
• Create document viewers and annotation capabilities for collaborative features.
• Integrate Azure AI Search for:
• Semantic search
• Vector embeddings
• Intelligent query capabilities
• Develop responsive and accessible enteprise-grade user interfaces.

AI / ML Integration
• Implement AI-powered text analysis and extraction using Azure OpenAI and GPT models.
• Design prompt engineering strategies with structured outputs and configurable schemas.
• Optimize token usage and handle rate limiting with retry logic.
• Work with embedding models for semantic search and similarity matching.
• Integrate managed identity authentication for secure AI service access.
• Develop hybrid solutions combining multiple AI services.

DevOps & Infrastructure
• Maintain CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps (YAML pipelines, build & release automation).
• Manage multi-environment deployments:
• DEV QA STG PROD
• Implement infrastructure as code and application configuration management.
• Monitor performance, cost, and usage via Azure Monitor and Application Insights.
• Manage Git workflows including feature branching, rebasing, cherry-picking, and PR management.

Quality & Maintenance
• Write unit and integration tests for backend and frontend applications.
• Conduct code reviews and ensure coding standards compliance.
• Debug production issues with proper logging and error handling.
• Optimize database queries, storage operations, and API performance.
• Document technical implementations, APIs, and system architecture.

Required Qualifications

Backend
• 5+ years of C#/.NET development (.NET Core / .NET 6+)
• Azure Functions
• RESTful API design
• 3+ years of React development
• TypeScript, Hooks, Context API
• Modern state management
• Strong Azure experience including:
• Blob Storage
• Azure Functions
• App Service
• Key Vault
• Application Insights
• Entity Framework Core
• SQL Server
• LINQ
• Database design & query optimization
• Experience with Azure OpenAI and GPT models

Early response is appreciated....

In compliance with the salary transparency law, the expected pay range for this role is $40-45.00/hr. Actual compensation depends on experience and interview evaluation.

Thanks Kripali Sahu Technical Recruiter | Empower Professionals Phone: x 332 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fax: | 100 Franklin Square Drive Suite 104 | Somerset, NJ 08873

Certified NJ and NY Minority Business Enterprise (NMSDC)

data.job_description:
About this role

About This Role 
We are a dynamic, data-driven team at the intersection of finance and technology.

As a software engineer, you will build applications and processes to help drive business growth. This position requires strong programming skills, analytical thinking, and a passion for learning. You will collaborate with experienced engineers to develop and improve software systems. 

Role Responsibilities:
• Design, code, test, and support reliable, robust software applications and services that meet high-quality standards 
• Participate in cross-functional feature requirements gathering, design, and implementation 
• Collaborate with product management to prioritize and organize development sprints 
• Perform code reviews and provide timely, constructive feedback to fellow engineers 

Key Qualifications 
• 2–5 years of experience in Python programming 
• Strong background in mathematics, algorithms, logic, and statistics 
• Extensive database experience (MySQL preferred; SQL/Postgres also valuable)
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or STEM field 

Relevant Experience:
• Proficiency with Python packages, such as Pandas, NumPy, DashApps 
• Hands-on experience with AWS (RDS, EC2, serverless) and Open Container Initiative (OCI) container packaging and runtime 
• Interest and knowledge in finance, particularly Options, Stocks, and Bonds

For Chicago, IL Only the salary range for this position is USD$120,000.00 - USD$148,000.00 . Additionally, employees are eligible for an annual discretionary bonus, and benefits including healthcare, leave benefits, and retirement benefits. BlackRock operates a pay-for-performance compensation philosophy and your total compensation may vary based on role, location, and firm, department and individual performance.

Our benefits

To help you stay energized, engaged and inspired, we offer a wide range of benefits including a strong retirement plan, tuition reimbursement, comprehensive healthcare, support for working parents and Flexible Time Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for the people you care about.

Our hybrid work model

BlackRock’s hybrid work model is designed to enable a culture of collaboration and apprenticeship that enriches the experience of our employees, while supporting flexibility for all. Employees are currently required to work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the flexibility to work from home 1 day a week. Some business groups may require more time in the office due to their roles and responsibilities. We remain focused on increasing the impactful moments that arise when we work together in person – aligned with our commitment to performance and innovation. As a new joiner, you can count on this hybrid model to accelerate your learning and onboarding experience here at BlackRock.

About BlackRock

At BlackRock, we are all connected by one mission: to help more and more people experience financial well-being. Our clients, and the people they serve, are saving for retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive progress.

This mission would not be possible without our smartest investment – the one we make in our employees. It’s why we’re dedicated to creating an environment where our colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with networks, benefits and development opportunities to help them thrive.

For additional information on BlackRock, please visit @blackrock | Twitter: @blackrock | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/blackrock

BlackRock is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity to all applicants and existing employees, and we evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, creed, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy and gender identity/expression), sexual orientation, age, ancestry, physical or mental disability, marital status, political affiliation, religion, citizenship status, genetic information, veteran status, or any other basis protected under applicable federal, state, or local law. View the EEOC’s Know Your Rights poster and its supplement and the pay transparency statement.

BlackRock is committed to full inclusion of all qualified individuals and to providing reasonable accommodations or job modifications for individuals with disabilities. If reasonable accommodation/adjustments are needed throughout the employment process, please email Disability.Assistance@blackrock.com. All requests are treated in line with our privacy policy.

BlackRock will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records in a manner consistent with the requirements of the law, including any applicable fair chance law.

Qualifications: This position requires strong programming skills, analytical thinking, and a passion for learning
2–5 years of experience in Python programming
Strong background in mathematics, algorithms, logic, and statistics
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or STEM field
Proficiency with Python packages, such as Pandas, NumPy, DashApps
Hands-on experience with AWS (RDS, EC2, serverless) and Open Container Initiative (OCI) container packaging and runtime
Interest and knowledge in finance, particularly Options, Stocks, and Bonds
Benefits: For Chicago, IL Only the salary range for this position is USD$120,000.00 - USD$148,000.00
Additionally, employees are eligible for an annual discretionary bonus, and benefits including healthcare, leave benefits, and retirement benefits
BlackRock operates a pay-for-performance compensation philosophy and your total compensation may vary based on role, location, and firm, department and individual performance

To help you stay energized, engaged and inspired, we offer a wide range of benefits including a strong retirement plan, tuition reimbursement, comprehensive healthcare, support for working parents and Flexible Time Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for the people you care about
Employees are currently required to work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the flexibility to work from home 1 day a week
Responsibilities: As a software engineer, you will build applications and processes to help drive business growth
You will collaborate with experienced engineers to develop and improve software systems.
Design, code, test, and support reliable, robust software applications and services that meet high-quality standards
Participate in cross-functional feature requirements gathering, design, and implementation
Collaborate with product management to prioritize and organize development sprints
Perform code reviews and provide timely, constructive feedback to fellow engineers

data.job_title: Google Cloud Platform Deveops (Onsite role in Chicago,IL)
data.job_description:
Dice is the leading career destination for tech experts at every stage of their careers. Our client, EdgeAll, is seeking the following. Apply via Dice today!

"Google Cloud Platform DevOps work for the Edge Platform team:

Mandatory skills(Hands On)

Infrastructure architecture, DevOps, or cloud engineering roles.

Deep, hands-on expertise with Terraform (advanced level), including reusable modules, remote state, and workspaces.

Advanced knowledge of Google Cloud Platform (Google Cloud Platform) services and architectural patterns.

Proficient in Python scripting for infrastructure automation and integration.

Proven experience in building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Git-based workflow

Deep, hands-on expertise with on Kubernetes or GKE.

Good to have and advantage if below is available :

Experience with GDCC (Google Distributed Cloud).

Strong understanding of Cloud IAM, RBAC, and Workload Identity Federation for secure authentication across services.

Solid background in cloud security, including encryption, firewall policies, VPC design, and service accounts."

Qualifications: Mandatory skills(Hands On)
Infrastructure architecture, DevOps, or cloud engineering roles
Deep, hands-on expertise with Terraform (advanced level), including reusable modules, remote state, and workspaces
Advanced knowledge of Google Cloud Platform (Google Cloud Platform) services and architectural patterns
Proficient in Python scripting for infrastructure automation and integration
Proven experience in building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Git-based workflow
Deep, hands-on expertise with on Kubernetes or GKE
Experience with GDCC (Google Distributed Cloud)
Strong understanding of Cloud IAM, RBAC, and Workload Identity Federation for secure authentication across services
Solid background in cloud security, including encryption, firewall policies, VPC design, and service accounts."
